# nxus-docs
> Public Astro Starlight documentation site for nxus.SYSTEMS products at https://docs.nxus.systems/.

This repository contains the docs site shell, navigation, theme, components,
and build tooling. Product documentation content is generated from source
repositories and synced here before public deployment.

## Canonical AI Indexes

- [Hosted llms.txt](https://docs.nxus.systems/llms.txt): concise canonical index for the public docs site.
- [Hosted llms-full.txt](https://docs.nxus.systems/llms-full.txt): full generated Markdown context for the public docs site.

The hosted files are generated by `npm run build` through
`scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs`. Treat them as the source of truth for full
documentation context.

## Current Supported Surfaces

- Rust
- Go
- Python
- C ABI
- CLI/Bash workflows

## Do Not Infer

- Do not claim current JavaScript, TypeScript, or Node SDK support.
- Do not describe C support as first-class C; use C ABI until first-class C
  requirements are complete.
- Do not treat repo-root `llms.txt` as a replacement for the hosted canonical
  docs indexes.

## Key Repository Links

- [README](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/blob/main/README.md)
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Agent instructions](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [Astro config](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/blob/main/astro.config.mjs)
- [AI index generator](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/blob/main/scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs)
- [Docs content root](https://github.com/nxus-SYSTEMS/nxus-docs/tree/main/src/content/docs)
